strengths: Deep technical craftsmanship across full stack with 15+ years in software engineering, strong focus on code quality, testing practices, and TDD-driven development
Currently contributing to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq, demonstrating active engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
Entrepreneurial experience founding and maintaining GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform adopted by real organizations like Green Map
concerns: No demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms built and shipped; current work appears infrastructure-focused rather than product-focused with market recognition
Lacks preferred Master's/PhD in AI field; educational background is in CS and Fine Arts rather than AI-specific discipline
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, business partnership experience, or director-level leadership needed to advise enterprises on cloud/AI adoption

key_factors.factor: AI product expertise and market recognition
Strategic advisory and enterprise leadership experience
Cloud infrastructure and systems design depth

response.justification: Bogdan is a technically excellent software engineer with 15+ years of diverse experience and demonstrable craftsmanship. He currently engages with AI infrastructure at re:cinq and has entrepreneurial credentials. However, he lacks the core requirements for this director-level Principal Engineer role: no shipped AI-powered products, no recognized market expertise in AI, and no strategic advisory or business leadership track record. The role requires someone who has built and scaled AI products and can partner strategically with enterprise customers, which this resume does not substantiate.
